channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency: One Ideal Signing for All 32 Teams
item.description: Who should every team sign in NFL free agency? We try to find the best fit for each.

item.title: A Flick And Volley By A Future USA Coach Joins Top World Cup Moments
item.description: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.

item.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency Tracker: Texans Extend All-Pro Danielle Hunter
item.description: Here are all the latest signings, trades and releases around the NFL.

item.title: Australia Beats Czechia 5-1 To Stay Undefeated In The World Baseball Classic
item.description: Australia defeated Czechia 5-1 behind a three-run homer from Chicago White Sox infielder Curtis Mead.

item.title: Lionel Messi's Camp 'Nu'? Inter Miami Unveils Stadium Name Before April 2026 Opener
item.description: Inter Miami has revealed that Nu, a digital financial service platform, will sponsor their new stadium at Miami Freedom Park, set to open this April.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal forced to let one key player go this summer
item.description: Arsenal must offload a first-term player in the summer to balance their books, but who could it be? Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
item.description: LeBron James made the 15,838th FG of his career on Thursday night, passing Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

item.title: Source: DE Hunter gets $40M deal from Texans
item.description: The Texans agreed to a one-year, $40 million contract extension with defensive end Danielle Hunter, a source confirmed to ESPN.

item.title: Summer transfer needs for all 20 Premier League teams
item.description: What should your team be focusing on ahead of the transfer window?

item.title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
item.description: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he's the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling t...
